summary: Comprehensive testing of CSV leads MongoDB sync feature. All 3 features verified working: 1) CSV leads stored in MongoDB (not localStorage), 2) 'Geen interesse' status option added, 3) WhatsApp button auto-sets status to 'benaderd'. Cross-device sync confirmed - leads imported on Admin Dashboard appear on LeadFinder without re-importing.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/admin/csv-leads returns empty array when no leads
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/csv-leads saves leads to MongoDB
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin/csv-leads/{id}/status updates lead status
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin/csv-leads/{id}/status with 'geen_interesse' status accepted
BACKEND: DELETE /api/admin/csv-leads/{id} removes single lead
BACKEND: DELETE /api/admin/csv-leads clears all leads
BACKEND: PUT status on nonexistent lead returns 404
BACKEND: DELETE nonexistent lead returns 404
BACKEND: All 5 status options accepted (nieuw, benaderd, gereageerd, geen_interesse, overgeslagen)
BACKEND: Admin login with correct password succeeds
BACKEND: Admin login with wrong password returns 401
ADMIN UI: Login page loads correctly
ADMIN UI: Login with password yrvante2025 succeeds
ADMIN UI: CSV tab navigation works
ADMIN UI: CSV file import works
ADMIN UI: Imported leads appear in table
ADMIN UI: Status dropdown has all 5 options including 'Geen interesse'
ADMIN UI: Status change to 'geen_interesse' persists in database
ADMIN UI: WhatsApp button click changes status to 'benaderd'
ADMIN UI: Delete lead removes it from table and database
LEADFINDER UI: Login page loads correctly
LEADFINDER UI: Login with password yrvante2025 succeeds
LEADFINDER UI: CSV tab navigation works
LEADFINDER UI: Leads from Admin Dashboard appear (cross-device sync working)
LEADFINDER UI: Status dropdown has all 5 options including 'Geen interesse'
LEADFINDER UI: WhatsApp button click changes status to 'benaderd'
LEADFINDER UI: Status change persists after page reload
critical_code_review_comments: CSV leads API endpoints correctly implemented at lines 937-976 in server.py
CsvLead model includes all required fields including 'status' with default 'nieuw'
POST /api/admin/csv-leads correctly checks for existing IDs to avoid duplicates
Both AdminDashboard.jsx and LeadFinderPage.jsx use same API endpoints for CSV leads
AdminDashboard uses axios, LeadFinderPage uses fetch - both work correctly
CSV_STATUS_OPTIONS array includes 'geen_interesse' option in both frontend files
WhatsApp button onClick correctly calls updateCsvStatus('benaderd') after window.open()

csv_mongodb_sync.details: CSV leads stored in MongoDB via /api/admin/csv-leads endpoints. Both Admin Dashboard and LeadFinder fetch from same API.

geen_interesse_status.details: Status dropdown has 5 options: nieuw, benaderd, gereageerd, geen_interesse, overgeslagen. 'Geen interesse' displays with red color.

whatsapp_auto_status.details: WhatsApp button onClick opens WhatsApp URL and calls updateCsvStatus(id, 'benaderd') to auto-set status.

cross_device_sync.details: Leads imported on Admin Dashboard appear on LeadFinder without re-importing. Both pages use same MongoDB collection.

seed_data_creation: Created /tmp/test_csv_leads.csv with 3 test leads for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37: Verified CSV leads MongoDB sync feature. Key endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/csv-leads. Status options: nieuw, benaderd, gereageerd, geen_interesse, overgeslagen. WhatsApp button uses onClick with window.open() + updateCsvStatus(). Both AdminDashboard.jsx and LeadFinderPage.jsx share same API but use different HTTP clients (axios vs fetch).
